assessor_1_raw: Multimodal pathology: rigorous design with dual generalization test (temporal + institutional). Macro-F1 appropriately addresses rare subtype classification. Label leakage audit essential and well-specified. Per-class PPV/NPV with CIs cover clinical metrics. Verdict: defense_wins.
assessor_2_raw: Well-designed clinical AI experiment. Image-only baseline with identical architecture is the right ablation for isolating text contribution. Label noise robustness analysis (excluding low-confidence cases) is excellent. ECE per class important for clinical deployment. Verdict: defense_wins.
assessor_3_raw: Strong pathology classification study. Stratified split at institutional and temporal level is the gold standard for clinical AI generalization testing. Macro-F1 with per-class breakdowns is appropriate. No methodological flaws. Verdict: defense_wins.
adjudication_raw: All three assessors unanimous: defense_wins across all runs.
